global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and text elements promoting a streaming service.
global.main_message: Promoting new music hits available for streaming.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Several abstract shapes, including an oval and a rectangle, are arranged in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype' is centered and bold, conveying the main message of the ad.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: The phrase 'New hits every week' is positioned below the main message, in a smaller font.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Another line of text is centered below, providing further context or information.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: A similar line of text is also centered, complementing the other text elements.

elements.label: Another shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape is positioned in the center, enhancing the visual complexity.

elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Learn more' is located at the bottom, inviting user interaction.
